data.name: Dominated By: Yandere Goth Childhood Friend
data.detailed_description:
After you graduate university and get a job in a far-away town, you start looking for an apartment. Kuroki, your giant goth childhood friend informs you that she also got a job in the same town and suggests that the two of you move in together. Kuroki drags you along in her antics and makes your first day living together one of the most eventful, important and sexual days of your life. Your giant goth yandere childhood friend's true sadistic and sexual intentions don't stay hidden for long

  • ~7K words

  • 2 Endings

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 23 Unique character images

  • 32 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
